Mtn To Set Date For Hearing For Default Judgment And Pos
Off Calendar Apr-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Richard O'Hare, Esq. appeared for and with the Plaintiff Irina Trubnikov, was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants Joseph Kristul and Maria Kristul as follows:

Damages/Principal - $269,095.88
Prejudgment Interest - $16,439.56
Attorney's Fees - 6,864.00
Costs - $544.50 for a total judgment in the amount of $292,943.94

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Continued To Apr-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
